Article.ArticleTitle: The antimicrobial potential of Fomitopsis Pinicola across multiple applications.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Molecular Chemistry, Materials and Catalysis Laboratory, Faculty of Sciences and Technology, Sultan Moulay Slimane University, Beni-Mellal, B.P.523, 23000, Morocco. sofia.zazouli@usms.ma.
Higher School of Education and Training, Science and Technology Team, Ibn Zohr University of Agadir, Agadir, Morocco.
Biomare Laboratory, Faculty of Sciences, Chouaib Doukkali University, El Jadida, Route Ben Maachou, PO Box 20, 24000, Morocco.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics statement: No animals or human subjects were used in the preparation of this review article. All datasets analyzed are publicly available and anonymized. Clinical trial number: Not applicable. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
